headline: TRAIN A COMPLIANT WORKFORCE
subheading: Build a risk-based GMP training programme that stands up to MHRA inspection.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial composition evoking pharmaceutical workforce competence and structured GMP training. A glowing teal grid or matrix of interconnected nodes rises from a deep navy background, each node linked by luminous cyan threads suggesting roles mapped to skills and certified competence pathways. Stylised abstract human silhouettes formed from light particles ascend a series of translucent glass tiers, representing progressive qualification from induction to mastery. Floating frosted-glass document cards with subtle checkmark glyphs and audit-trail layers drift through the scene, hinting at inspection-ready records and ALCOA-plus data integrity. A single fresh-green accent light pulses at the apex of the competence ladder, signalling verified readiness. Brushed stainless and frosted glass textures, soft volumetric lighting, shallow depth of field, clinical-luxury mood, premium and precise. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
